svg.text: Research-backed anatomical map for stimulus-to-neuron-to-motor visualization in Nema Lab

g.text: Head on the left, tail on the right. Labels are attached to all 302 neurons.
Same 302 neurons, second projection for depth-aware layout decisions.
Color-coded by anatomical ganglion / major body region.

svg.text: Primary atlas backbone: Long et al. 2022 (300 neurons). CANL/CANR are affine-projected from the WormNeuroAtlas anatomical atlas into the same frame; atlas fit RMSE = 10.20.
Connectome context: White et al. 1986 and Cook et al. 2019. NeuroPAL and whole-brain activity papers should be layered next for dynamic state visualization.
